description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a spacious backyard featuring a swimming pool, hot tub, and lounge area. The house has a clean, rectangular form with large windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front and sides. The front facade includes a covered patio supported by columns, providing shade to the outdoor seating and pool area. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roof and patio cover. Landscaping elements include a few palm trees and shrubs, adding greenery to the otherwise open lawn. The house appears to have multiple entry points, with the main entrance located beneath the covered patio.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a backyard featuring a pool, hot tub, and patio. The exterior is light-colored with a covered front patio and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered patio, pool, hot tub, and main entryway with large windows and minimal landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, window arrangement, and the backyard amenities including the pool and hot tub.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with fewer windows and a simple lawn with palm trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side elevation, window placement, and the pool area extending from the patio.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered patio with columns, main door beneath overhang, steps leading to entry, minimal decorative elements
